content.rendered:
Traditional mobile apps can be heavy, slow to update, and take up precious storage space. Attendo utilizes Progressive Web App (PWA) technology to give you the best of both worlds. You get the smooth, immersive feel of a native app with the accessibility of a website.

Key Capabilities

One-Click Installation: Forget the App Store or Play Store. Simply open Attendo in your browser and click “Install App” (or “Add to Home Screen”). The app icon appears instantly on your device.

Blazing Fast Performance: PWAs are built to be light on their feet — and Attendo is no exception. It loads almost instantly, even on slower mobile networks, so your team can clock in, check tasks, or get things done without waiting around.

Native App Experience: Once installed, the browser interface (address bar, navigation buttons) disappears. You get a clean, full-screen experience that looks and feels exactly like a native mobile app.

Always Up-to-Date: You never need to manually “update” the app. Every time we push a new feature or fix to the cloud, your PWA updates automatically the next time you open it.

Cross-Platform Compatible: Works seamlessly on iOS, Android, Windows, and macOS. Whether you are on an iPhone, a Samsung tablet, or a Windows laptop, the experience remains consistent.

How to “Install” Attendo

On Android (Chrome): Open your portal url ➝ Tap the menu (three dots) ➝ Select “Install App”.

On iOS (Safari): Open your portal url ➝ Tap the “Share” button ➝ Scroll down and tap “Add to Home Screen”.

On Desktop (Chrome/Edge): Look for the install icon (+) in the address bar ➝ Click “Install”.
